Activation of the 2 M4-A.1 Infrastructure architecture tests. The M4-B plan promotion does not enable Infrastructure_Respects_ProcessBoundary or Infrastructure_Respects_CredentialBoundary; they are registered-but-disabled per ADR-016 and activate in M4-D.

Design-system AppDialog primitive. The M4-B plan promotion does not introduce a new design-system primitive. The /diagnostics page composes the M1.2 primitives (AppPanel, AppCard, AppStack, AppBadge, AppStatusDot) and the M3.2 AppPageHeader. The two new components (AppCapabilityList + AppKeyValueList) are data-owning four-state per docs/design-system.md section 5.4.

macOS / Linux credential vault. The WindowsCredentialVault is Windows-only; on non-Windows hosts the M4-B SystemHostCapabilitiesService gates Windows-only tools (powershell.exe, wsl.exe, wt.exe) on IPlatformInfo.IsWindows.

Push to remote. Push is not authorised in this session; the remote (origin = https://github.com/maestroohk/ai-engineering-platform.git) is configured but pushing is not authorised. The M4-B plan promotion does not push.

last_action.outcome: M4-B plan promotion (T-023) is delivered 2026-07-13. The M4-B plan is drafted at .ai/plans/M4-B-capability-detection.md with Status: Awaiting Approval (12 sections mirroring the M4-A plan's 12-section structure; ~600-1000 lines). The plan covers IHostCapabilitiesService + HostCapabilities + HostCapability records; SystemHostCapabilitiesService implementation probing six host tools (git, ollama, powershell.exe, wsl.exe, wt.exe, bash.exe) via IProcessRunner.RunToCompletionAsync(tool, new[] { '--version' }, ct) with a 5-second per-tool timeout and reading six provider credentials via ICredentialVault.GetAsync('provider:<key>:token', ct); AppCapabilityList + AppKeyValueList data-owning four-state design-system components composing the M1.2 primitives (AppPanel, AppCard, AppStack, AppBadge, AppStatusDot); /diagnostics page registered in the M2.2 navigation registry via [RouteMetadata] (Href /diagnostics, Title Diagnostics, Order 4, ShowInSidebar = true, Icon ◆); startup capability-report log through ILogger<Program>; Capabilities_Resolved_Through_Service architecture test (scoped to App/Components/Diagnostics/ to avoid the M4-A.2 Open Action false positive); docs/capabilities.md documentation. docs/infrastructure.md section 11 (M4-B Consumers) is added; ROADMAP.md M4-B row is updated to Active and the M4-B Definition of done is expanded; .ai/plans/master-delivery-plan.md section 1 M4-B row is updated to Active and the section 3 M4-B block is expanded and the M4-B slice breakdown table is added; .ai/state/capabilities.json C-015 evidence.plans is initialised with .ai/plans/M4-B-capability-detection.md; the project-continuity state is updated (session.json [this file], tasks.json T-023 record, current.md, task-board.md, milestones.json). The M4-B plan promotion commit chore(m4-b.plan): draft M4-B capability detection plan in Awaiting Approval is on main. The M4-B plan promotion feature branch is fast-forwarded into main and deleted.
